title: Landslide Mapping Urged After Fatalities
summary: Families demand faster landslide mapping and early warning systems after a deadly landslide during Helene.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the urgent need for improved disaster preparedness and infrastructure in vulnerable areas.

title: Man Charged in Family Shooting
summary: Ronnie Corey Perry Jr., a convicted felon, is charged with shooting a family member in Charlotte-Mecklenburg.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the ongoing issue of gun violence and repeat offenders in the community.

title: Shooting at York County Lounge
summary: One person was injured in a shooting at the Blue Olive Lounge in York County.
charlotte_impact: Adds to concerns about public safety and potential violence in entertainment venues.

title: Multiple Injuries in West Charlotte Crash
summary: Four people were injured in a crash involving a bus on Freedom Drive in west Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Raises questions about traffic safety and the potential for serious accidents on busy roads.

title: Explosives and Drugs Found During Traffic Stop
summary: An Alexander County man faces 14 charges after a traffic stop revealed explosives, drugs, and a firearm.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the presence of dangerous materials and potential criminal activity in the area.

title: Industrial Accident at FedEx Facility
summary: One person was seriously injured in an industrial accident at a FedEx Ship Center on Yorkmont Road.
charlotte_impact: Draws attention to workplace safety and the risks associated with industrial environments.

title: Freeze Warning Issued for Several Counties
summary: A Freeze Warning is in effect for Ashe, Watauga, and Avery counties, with frost advisory north of Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Informs residents about potential weather hazards and the need to protect crops and property.

title: FTC to Ease Subscription Cancellations
summary: The FTC is reworking its "click to cancel" rule to make subscription cancellations easier for consumers.
charlotte_impact: Addresses consumer frustration with difficult subscription cancellation processes.

title: Calls for School Board Member's Resignation
summary: Protesters are demanding the resignation of a Gaston school board member over anti-Islamic comments on Facebook.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of responsible social media behavior for public officials.

title: Fatal Motorcycle Crash in York County
summary: A rear-end collision between two motorcycles in York County resulted in one death and one injury.
charlotte_impact: Serves as a reminder of motorcycle safety and the potential for serious accidents.

title: Vote on School District Merger
summary: Catawba County commissioners will vote on a proposal to merge three school districts into one county-wide system.
charlotte_impact: Indicates a significant change in the local education system.

title: Fatal Shooting in Northwest Charlotte
summary: One man died after a shooting into an occupied home in northwest Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Contributes to concerns about gun violence and neighborhood safety.

title: Fatal Blue Line Collision
summary: A man was killed in a collision with the Blue Line train in northeast Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Raises questions about safety around public transportation and pedestrian awareness.

title: One Killed in Home Invasion Attempt
summary: A person was killed during a reported home invasion attempt in Statesville.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the risk of violent crime and the importance of home security.

title: Power Restored After Outages
summary: Power has been restored for most Duke Energy customers, with some scattered outages remaining, mainly in the University Area.
charlotte_impact: Provides updates on utility services and the impact of recent power outages.
